html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

“Reflects damage back at enemies and even more for ones that are Shadow Aligned.”

-

The Brambleshade Armor is a character-specific Armor Item craftable only by Wormwood. It is can be crafted only if Wormwood has the "Lunar Guardian I" Skill. Only Wormwood can equip Brambleshade Armor.

It has 830 durability and absorbs 80% of physical damage. Whenever a Character wearing the Bramble Husk is attacked by a Mob, 22.6 average damage and 5 Planar Damage is dealt to each Mob within a radius of one tile, and it pacifies Gestalts. This effect is not triggered by taking non-impact damage sources such as overheating, freezing, starvation, and damage from Acid Rain.

It also has the added bonus of preventing damage from Spiky Bushes, Cactus, Roses, and Bramble Traps. This means that one can harmlessly harvest Spiky Bushes or stand next to a Bramble Trap when it is triggered and not take any splash damage. Durability of the armor is not decreased when this effect occurs.

Contents

  • 1 Bramble Husk Specialist
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets

Bramble Husk Specialist

If Wormwood has the "Bramble Husk Specialist" Skill, he will deal 22.6 damage and 5 Planar Damage after every 3rd attack without being attacked. The effect does not deal damage to followers and works while riding a Beefalo.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Provides the prickliest plant-based protection.

Protective armor that pokes back!

(associated with: )

Trivia

  • The Brambleshade Armor was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.

“That'll put a thorn in your side.”
–Wilson
“This must be one of Wormwood's.”
–Willow
“Only for leafy friend? Too small for Wolfgang muscles anyway.”
–Wolfgang
“I'd find it useful if I feared death.”
–Wendy
“DEADLY PLANT ARMOR. I'LL ALLOW IT”
–WX-78
“Plant-based, plant-made, and plant-worn.”
–Wickerbottom
“That is some fine craftsmanship.”
–Woodie
“Of course the plant saves the best stuff for himself.”
–Maxwell
“This will make my plant ally more deadly in battle.”
–Wigfrid
“We aren't allowed to play with that. It's just for Wormwood.”
–Webber
“The little veg's own concoction.”
–Warly
“Mean and pokey! Not good for hugs”
–Wormwood
“Pretty well constructed, for a plant.”
–Winona
“Prickly plant protection, perfection!”
–Wortox
“Plant's killing shirt!”
–Wurt
“Aww. Why don't I get to wear it?”
–Walter
“It kills while it protects. Rather efficient.”
–Wanda
“Reflects damage back at enemies and even more for ones that are Shadow Aligned.”
-

This effect is not triggered by taking non-impact damage sources such as overheating, freezing, starvation, and damage from Acid Rain.
It also has the added bonus of preventing damage from Spiky Bushes, Cactus, Roses, and Bramble Traps. This means that one can harmlessly harvest Spiky Bushes or stand next to a Bramble Trap when it is triggered and not take any splash damage.
